definition: The most generic type of item.
The most generic kind of creative work, including books, movies, photographs, software programs, etc.
definition_ko: 책·영화·사진·소프트웨어 등을 포함하는 가장 일반적인 창작물 타입.

definition: A body of structured information describing some topic(s) of interest.
equivalent_terms: dcat:Dataset, dctype:Dataset, void:Dataset, prov:Entity (loose), cr extends sc:Dataset
notes: equivalentClass declared with dcat:Dataset, dctype:Dataset, void:Dataset

definition: A collection of datasets.
All or part of a [[Dataset]] in downloadable form.
definition_ko: 다운로드 가능한 형태의 데이터셋 전부 또는 일부.

definition: A single feed providing structured information about one or more entities or topics.
definition_ko: 하나 이상의 개체·주제에 대한 구조화된 정보를 제공하는 단일 피드.

definition: A single item within a larger data feed.

A media object, such as an image, video, audio, or text object embedded in a web page or a downloadable dataset i.e. DataDownload. Note that a creative work may have many media objects associated with it on the same web page. For example, a page about a single song (MusicRecording) may have a music video (VideoObject), and a high and low bandwidth audio stream (2 AudioObject's).
definition_ko: 웹 페이지 또는 다운로드 가능 데이터셋(DataDownload)에 포함된 이미지·비디오·오디오·텍스트 등 미디어 객체.

definition: A person (alive, dead, undead, or fictional).
An organization such as a school, NGO, corporation, club, etc.
Entities that have a somewhat fixed, physical extension.
The mailing address.
A contact point—for example, a Customer Complaints department.
notes: equivalentClass with vcard:VCard. Original spec uses HTML entity — (em-dash)

definition: A property-value pair, e.g. representing a feature of a product or place. Use the 'name' property for the name of the property. If there is an additional human-readable version of the value, put that into the 'description' property. Always use specific schema.org properties when a) they exist and b) you can populate them. Using PropertyValue as a substitute will typically not trigger the same effect as using the original, specific property.
definition_ko: 속성-값 쌍. 제품·장소의 특성 표현. name으로 속성명, description으로 사람이 읽기 쉬운 값.
notes: [TRUNCATED→BOOSTED] Original JSON-LD rdfs:comment includes \\n\\n line breaks (converted to spaces in definition column). Full text preserved verbatim. Used for variable measurement in datasets via cr:variableMeasured

definition: A word, name, acronym, phrase, etc. with a formal definition. Often used in the context of category or subject classification, glossaries or dictionaries, product or creative work types, etc. Use the name property for the term being defined, use termCode if the term has an alpha-numeric code allocated, use description to provide the definition of the term. Use the about property to specify what the term is about.
definition_ko: 공식 정의를 가진 단어·이름·약어·구. 분류·용어집·사전 맥락에서 사용.
notes: [BORDERLINE] schema:isPartOf <https://pending.schema.org>; pending area but explicitly requested by user

definition: A set of defined terms, for example a set of categories or a classification scheme, a glossary, dictionary or enumeration. Use the about property to specify what the term set is about.
notes: [BORDERLINE] schema:isPartOf <https://pending.schema.org>; pending area but explicitly requested by user

definition: The name of the item.
A description of the item.
The identifier property represents any kind of identifier for any kind of Thing.
definition_ko: 모든 종류의 Thing에 대한 모든 종류의 식별자.

definition: URL of the item.
URL of a reference Web page that unambiguously indicates the item's identity. E.g. the URL of the item's Wikipedia page, Wikidata entry, or official website.
definition_ko: 항목의 정체를 모호하지 않게 가리키는 참조 웹 페이지 URL (Wikipedia·Wikidata·공식 사이트 등).

definition: An alias for the item.
An additional type for the item, typically used for adding more specific types from external vocabularies in microdata syntax.
definition_ko: 항목의 추가 타입 (외부 어휘의 더 구체적인 타입을 추가할 때 사용).

definition: A sub property of description. A short description of the item used to disambiguate from other, similar items. Information from other properties (in particular, name) may be necessary for the description to be useful for disambiguation.
definition_ko: 유사 항목과 구별하기 위한 짧은 설명. description의 sub property.

definition: An image of the item.
Indicates a page (or other CreativeWork) for which this thing is the main entity being described. See [background notes](/docs/datamodel.html#mainEntityBackground) for details.
definition_ko: 이 항목을 주된 개체로 기술하는 페이지·CreativeWork.

definition: A CreativeWork or Event about this Thing.
definition_ko: 이 Thing에 관한 CreativeWork 또는 Event.

definition: The subject matter of the content.
An abstract is a short description that summarizes a [[CreativeWork]].

The author of this content or rating. Please note that author is special in that HTML 5 provides a special mechanism for indicating authorship via the rel tag. That is equivalent to this and may be used interchangeably.
A citation or reference to another creative work, such as another publication, web page, scholarly article, etc.
definition_ko: 다른 창작물·간행물·웹 페이지·학술 논문 등에 대한 인용 또는 참조.

definition: Conditions that affect the availability of, or method(s) of access to, an item. Typically used for real world items such as an [[ArchiveComponent]] held by an [[ArchiveOrganization]]. This property is not suitable for use as a general Web access control mechanism. It is expressed only in natural language.
definition_ko: 항목의 가용성·접근 방식에 영향을 주는 조건. 자연어로만 표현.

definition: The location depicted or described in the content. For example the location in a photograph or painting.
definition_ko: 콘텐츠 내에서 묘사·기술된 위치 (예: 사진·그림 속 위치).

definition: A secondary contributor to the CreativeWork or Event.
The party holding the legal copyright to the CreativeWork.
Text of a notice appropriate for describing the copyright aspects of this Creative Work, ideally indicating the owner of the copyright for the Work.
definition_ko: CreativeWork의 저작권 측면을 기술하는 데 적합한 고지문 텍스트.

definition: The year during which the claimed copyright for the CreativeWork was first asserted.
The country of origin of something, including products as well as creative works such as movie and TV content.
The creator/author of this CreativeWork. This is the same as the Author property for CreativeWork.
Text that can be used to credit person(s) and/or organization(s) associated with a published Creative Work.
definition_ko: 발행된 CreativeWork에 관여한 사람·조직을 명시하는 데 사용할 수 있는 텍스트.

definition: The date on which the CreativeWork was created or the item was added to a DataFeed.
The date on which the CreativeWork was most recently modified or when the item's entry was modified within a DataFeed.
Date of first publication or broadcast. For example the date a [[CreativeWork]] was broadcast or a [[Certification]] was issued.
A media object that encodes this CreativeWork. This property is a synonym for associatedMedia.

Media type typically expressed using a MIME format (see [IANA site](http://www.iana.org/assignments/media-types/media-types.xhtml) and [MDN reference]) e.g. application/zip for a SoftwareApplication binary audio/mpeg for .mp3 etc.
A person or organization that supports (sponsors) something through some kind of financial contribution.
A [[Grant]] that directly or indirectly provide funding or sponsorship for this item. See also [[ownershipFundingInfo]].
definition_ko: 이 항목에 직간접적으로 자금·후원을 제공하는 Grant.

definition: Indicates an item or CreativeWork that is part of this item, or CreativeWork (in some sense).
The language of the content or performance or used in an action. Please use one of the language codes from the [IETF BCP 47 standard]. See also [[availableLanguage]].
definition_ko: 콘텐츠·공연의 언어 또는 행위에 사용된 언어.

definition: A resource from which this work is derived or from which it is a modification or adaptation.
definition_ko: 이 작품이 파생·수정·각색의 출처가 된 자원.

definition: Indicates an item or CreativeWork that this item, or CreativeWork (in some sense), is part of.
definition_ko: 이 항목·CreativeWork이 부분이 되는 상위 항목.

definition: Keywords or tags used to describe some item. Multiple textual entries in a keywords list are typically delimited by commas or by repeating the property.
A license document that applies to this content, typically indicated by URL.
The location where the CreativeWork was created, which may not be the same as the location depicted in the CreativeWork.
definition_ko: CreativeWork이 생성된 위치 (콘텐츠가 묘사하는 위치와 다를 수 있음).

definition: A maintainer of a [[Dataset]], software package ([[SoftwareApplication]]), or other [[Project]]. A maintainer is a [[Person]] or [[Organization]] that manages contributions to, and/or publication of, some (typically complex) artifact.
The person or organization who produced the work (e.g. music album movie TV/radio series etc.).

The service provider, service operator, or service performer; the goods producer. Another party (a seller) may offer those services or goods on behalf of the provider. A provider may also serve as the seller. Supersedes carrier.
The publisher of the creative work.
Indicates the date on which the current structured data was generated / published. Typically used alongside [[sdPublisher]].
notes: Refers to metadata generation date, not data itself

definition: A license document that applies to this structured data, typically indicated by URL.
notes: License of metadata, not of data

definition: Indicates the party responsible for generating and publishing the current structured data markup, typically in cases where the structured data is derived automatically from existing published content but published on a different site.
definition_ko: 현재 구조화된 데이터 마크업의 생성·발행 책임자.
notes: Publisher of metadata, not of data

definition: The Organization on whose behalf the creator was working.
The "spatial" property can be used in cases when more specific properties (e.g. [[locationCreated]], [[spatialCoverage]], [[contentLocation]]) are not known to be appropriate.
definition_ko: 더 구체적 속성이 적절치 않은 경우 사용하는 일반 공간 속성.

definition: The spatialCoverage of a CreativeWork indicates the place(s) which are the focus of the content. It is a subproperty of contentLocation intended primarily for more technical and detailed materials. For example with a Dataset, it indicates areas that the dataset describes: a dataset of New York weather would have spatialCoverage which was the place: the state of New York.
definition_ko: CreativeWork이 다루는 공간 범위. Dataset의 경우 데이터셋이 기술하는 지역.

definition: The "temporal" property can be used in cases where more specific properties (e.g. [[temporalCoverage]], [[dateCreated]], [[dateModified]], [[datePublished]]) are not known to be appropriate.
definition_ko: 더 구체적 속성이 적절치 않은 경우 사용하는 일반 시간 속성.

definition: The temporalCoverage of a CreativeWork indicates the period that the content applies to, i.e. that it describes, either as a DateTime or as a textual string indicating a time period in [ISO 8601 time interval format].

The schema.org [[usageInfo]] property indicates further information about a [[CreativeWork]]. This property is applicable both to works that are freely available and to those that require payment or other transactions.
definition_ko: CreativeWork에 대한 추가 정보 (이용 안내 등).

definition: The version of the CreativeWork embodied by a specified resource.

A downloadable form of this dataset, at a specific location, in a specific format. This property can be repeated if different variations are available. There is no expectation that different downloadable distributions must contain exactly equivalent information (see also [DCAT](https://www.w3.org/TR/vocab-dcat-3/#Class:Distribution) on this point). Different distributions might include or exclude different subsets of the entire dataset, for example.
definition_ko: 특정 위치·포맷의 데이터셋 다운로드 가능 형태. Croissant은 FileObject·FileSet 값으로 의미를 변경함.

definition: A data catalog which contains this dataset.

The International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) that identifies this serial publication. You can repeat this property to identify different formats of or the linking ISSN (ISSN-L) for this serial publication.
A subproperty of [[measurementTechnique]] that can be used for specifying specific methods, in particular via [[MeasurementMethodEnum]].
definition_ko: 특정 측정 방법을 명시하는 measurementTechnique의 하위 속성.

definition: A technique, method, or technology used in an [[Observation]], [[StatisticalVariable]] or [[Dataset]] (or [[DataDownload]], [[DataCatalog]]), corresponding to the method used for measuring the corresponding variable(s).

The variableMeasured property can indicate (repeated as necessary) the variables that are measured in some dataset, either described as text or as pairs of identifier and description using PropertyValue, or more explicitly as a [[StatisticalVariable]].
A dataset contained in this catalog.
An item within a data feed. Data feeds may have many elements.
An entity represented by an entry in a list or data feed (e.g. an 'artist' in a list of 'artists').
The datetime the item was removed from the DataFeed.
Actual bytes of the media object, for example the image file or video file.
definition_ko: 미디어 객체의 실제 바이트 (예: 이미지·비디오 파일).

definition: File size in (mega/kilo)bytes.
The [SHA-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/SHA-2) SHA256 hash of the content of the item. For example, a zero-length input has value 'e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855'.
Date (including time if available) when this media object was uploaded to this site.
definition_ko: 이 미디어 객체가 사이트에 업로드된 날짜·시간.

definition: The height of the item.
The width of the item.
The duration of the item (movie, audio recording, event, etc.) in [ISO 8601 duration format](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).
The bitrate of the media object.
A URL pointing to a player for a specific video. In general this is the information in the src element of an embed tag and should not be the same as the content of the loc tag.
Given name. In the U.S. the first name of a Person.
Family name. In the U.S. the last name of a Person.
The job title of the person (for example, Financial Manager).
Organizations that the person works for.
An organization that this person is affiliated with. For example, a school/university, a club, or a team.
Date of birth.

Gender of something typically a Person but possibly also fictional characters animals etc. While https://schema.org/Male and https://schema.org/Female may be used text strings are also acceptable for people who do not identify as a binary gender.

Of a [[Person]], and less typically of an [[Organization]], to indicate a topic that is known about - suggesting possible expertise but not implying it. We do not distinguish skill levels here, or relate this to educational content, events, objectives or [[JobPosting]] descriptions.

Of a [[Person]], and less typically of an [[Organization]], to indicate a known language. We do not distinguish skill levels or reading/writing/speaking/signing here. Use language codes from the [IETF BCP 47 standard].
An organization that the person is an alumni of.
Physical address of the item.
Email address.
The telephone number.
The fax number.
A contact point for a person or organization.
A person or organization who founded this organization.
The date that this organization was founded.
The official name of the organization e.g. the registered company name.
An associated logo.
An Organization (or ProgramMembership) to which this Person or Organization belongs.
definition_ko: 이 사람·조직이 속한 Organization 또는 ProgramMembership.

definition: The larger organization that this organization is a [[subOrganization]] of if any. Supersedes branchOf.

A relationship between an organization and a department of that organization, also described as an organization (allowing different urls, logos, opening hours). For example: a store with a pharmacy, or a bakery with a cafe.
definition_ko: 조직과 그 조직의 부서 간 관계.

definition: The geo coordinates of the place.
The latitude of a location. For example `37.42242` ([WGS 84](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_Geodetic_System)).
The longitude of a location. For example `-122.08585` ([WGS 84](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_Geodetic_System)).
A URL to a map of the place.
The street address. For example 1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy.
The locality in which the street address is and which is in the region. For example Mountain View.
The region in which the locality is and which is in the country. For example California or another appropriate first-level Administrative division.
The postal code. For example 94043.

The country. Recommended to be in 2-letter [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1) format, for example "US". For backward compatibility, a 3-letter [ISO 3166-1 alpha-3](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-3) country code such as "SGP" or a full country name such as "Singapore" can also be used.

A person or organization can have different contact points for different purposes. For example a sales contact point a PR contact point and so on. This property is used to specify the kind of contact point.
A language someone may use with or at the item service or place. Please use one of the language codes from the [IETF BCP 47 standard]. See also [[inLanguage]].
The hours during which this service or contact is available.

The product or service this support contact point is related to (such as product support for a particular product line). This can be a specific product or product line (e.g. "iPhone") or a general category of products or services (e.g. "smartphones").

domain: schema:ContactPoint, schema:DeliveryChargeSpecification, schema:Demand, schema:Offer, schema:Organization, schema:Service
definition: The geographic area where a service or offered item is provided. Supersedes serviceArea.

The value of a [[QuantitativeValue]] (including [[Observation]]) or property value node. For [[QuantitativeValue]] and [[MonetaryAmount]], the recommended type for values is 'Number'. For [[PropertyValue]], it can be 'Text', 'Number', 'Boolean', or 'StructuredValue'.
notes: [TRUNCATED→BOOSTED] Original Schema.org rdfs:comment additional usage notes: 'Use values from 0123456789 (Unicode DIGIT ZERO U+0030 to DIGIT NINE U+0039) rather than superficially similar Unicode symbols. Use . (Unicode FULL STOP U+002E) rather than , to indicate a decimal point. Avoid using these symbols as a readability separator.' See source_url for canonical full text

definition: A commonly used identifier for the characteristic represented by the property e.g. a manufacturer or a standard code for a property.
definition_ko: 속성이 나타내는 특성에 대한 공통 식별자.

definition: The unit of measurement given using the UN/CEFACT Common Code (3 characters) or a URL. Other codes than the UN/CEFACT Common Code may be used with a prefix followed by a colon.
definition_ko: 측정 단위 (UN/CEFACT Common Code 3자 또는 URL).

definition: A string or text indicating the unit of measurement. Useful if you cannot provide a standard unit code for unitCode.
The upper value of some characteristic or property.
The lower value of some characteristic or property.

range: schema:DefinedTerm, schema:Enumeration, schema:MeasurementMethodEnum, schema:MeasurementTypeEnumeration, schema:PropertyValue, schema:QualitativeValue, schema:QuantitativeValue, schema:StructuredValue, schema:Text
definition: A secondary value that provides additional information on the original value, e.g. a reference temperature or a type of measurement.
definition_ko: 원본 값에 대한 추가 정보를 제공하는 보조 값 (예: 기준 온도, 측정 유형).

definition: A code that identifies this [[DefinedTerm]] within a [[DefinedTermSet]].
definition_ko: DefinedTermSet 내에서 이 DefinedTerm을 식별하는 코드.

definition: A [[DefinedTermSet]] that contains this term.
A Defined Term contained in this term set.
definition_ko: 이 용어 집합에 포함된 정의된 용어.
